text: @DrRoselynAkombe If Kisiis depend on Onyoncha to propel Matiangi to presidency then they are toothless community
label: hate
rationale: 'they are toothless community' attributes collective political impotence as an inherent group characteristic - NCIC collective ethnic contempt against Kisiis as a community.

text: @_Yanoh We Luhyas LEFT that rotten chungwa to the few senile Luos who reason like juveniles. We can't be entangled in mediocrity #Sisindiosifuna. We don't fuckn care what people who couldn't make Rao president 5 times......5🤔 losers!
label: hate
rationale: 'senile Luos who reason like juveniles' and 'losers' collectively attributes intellectual inferiority to Luos as a group - NCIC ethnic contempt beyond mere electoral criticism.

text: Now the UGLY Kikuyu Goon from Wamunyoro and other UGLY women like Aoko are targeting beautiful women
label: hate
rationale: 'UGLY Kikuyu Goon' uses ethnicity as a slur attached to the insult - the ethnic marker decides this is hate, not merely offensive personal abuse.

text: @therealantoh Because your naive na mko na ujinga mingi sana.mna thani juu baba ali kufa tuta kua ma slaves wenu.the only mistake sifuna has done niku pendwa na wakikuyu.shame on you.we wount be your slaves anymore kaeni na oburu wenu.!!!wata waletea 2 term then yull see what will follow
label: hate
rationale: 'tuta kua ma slaves wenu' frames Kikuyus as slave-masters of other communities, and 'yull see what will follow' is a veiled threat directed at Kikuyus collectively.

text: RT @DrDennisOuma: As long as Ruto is sworn in as president in 2027. We don't care how many Kikuyus will be displaced or killed in post election violence in 2027. 2027 is payback time for KIKUYUS for swearing-in kibaki in 2007 at night🤗🤗🤗
label: hate
rationale: 'We don't care how many Kikuyus will be displaced or killed' and '2027 is payback time for KIKUYUS' explicitly endorses mass ethnic violence and displacement against Kikuyus as a group.

text: RT @DrDennisOuma: -DAILY REMINDER TO KIKUYUS 😬😬 -As long as Ruto is sworn- in as president in 2027. @WilliamsRuto -We don't care how many Kikuyus will be displaced or killed in post election violence in 2027. -2027 is payback time to KIKUYUS for swearing-in kibaki in 2007 at night🙂🙂🙂
label: hate
rationale: Identical incitement to 2077882627110109294: explicit endorsement of Kikuyus being 'displaced or killed' as ethnic 'payback', retweeted as a 'daily reminder'.

text: @georgediano Stupid Luos are singing Tutam led by Oguda na saii simiti ni 1200 watai jenga? Angalia boma wanakaa ata floor nia mavii ya ng'ombe
label: hate
rationale: 'Stupid Luos' plus mocking Luo homes as 'mavii ya ng'ombe' (cow dung) collectively ridicules and degrades Luos as a community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @Kibet_bull Wajaluo wangoje samaki
label: hate
rationale: 'Wajaluo wangoje samaki' (Luos should wait for fish) reduces the entire Luo community to a stereotype, expressing collective contempt and dismissal.

text: RT @DrDennisOuma: -KIKUYUS believe that William Ruto will Rule for 1 term?😁😁😁😁😁🤭🤭🤭🤭🤭🤭🤭🤭🤭🤭🤭 -I really PITY KIKUYUS IN 2027.😁😁 -HUYU HATOKI KWA KITI TILL 2032, -And there is NOTHING KIKUYUS CAN DO. @WilliamsRuto . -IF KIBAKI DIDN'T LEAVE IN 2007, -RUTO WILL NOT LEAVE IN 2027,
label: hate
rationale: 'I really PITY KIKUYUS IN 2027' and 'NOTHING KIKUYUS CAN DO' frames the community as powerless victims of coming retribution, echoing the same account's explicit violence posts - collective ethnic threat in context.

text: @georgediano I've never understood the Bukusu people kabisaa. I also hear they are the most troublesome when it comes to Luhya community unity. Why?
label: neither
rationale: Expressed as a genuine question about intra-community political dynamics rather than a collective negative attribution; mild puzzlement without contempt.

text: @Its_Mogire Ule mkisii jambazi mkubwa anaenda kufinywa makende shortly na Kasongo na uko apa unapiga mdomo Smh. Very uncouth plunderers.
label: hate
rationale: 'Very uncouth plunderers' follows 'ule mkisii' in a way that attributes collective moral degradation to Kisiis, moving beyond individual insult to group contempt.

text: @georgediano Kenya politics is tribal, only fools and fake Genzuzu are living in denial, Kalonzo can win election by solidifying ukambani as a voting block, achukue Matiang'i akuje naza Wakisii, Edwin Sifuna hana votes, Bukusus have always voted 4 the sitting government
label: neither
rationale: Electoral coalition analysis and voting-bloc arithmetic across multiple communities with no contempt directed at any group.

text: @Maryian96 Just loosen your thong and wait Bookmark this ..........KIKUYUS will NEVER see the Presidency for a Loooooooong While and thankfully so💯 We've had three presidents MOVE ON MEANWHILE the CURSE of the Mountain aka Wamunyoro is the most stupid human being alive
label: hate
rationale: 'KIKUYUS will NEVER see the Presidency' declares the entire Kikuyu community categorically unfit to hold power - NCIC ethnic contempt; the 'CURSE of the Mountain' compounds collective stigmatisation.

text: @_fels1 You should be ashamed of yourself, puga. @UDAKenya goes to Ol Kalau and bribe voters with gas cylinders. Same UDA goes to Nyanza and bribe voters with Ksh200. Luos won't give us rest on these streets. They are all over busy singing tutam. Luos are FOOLS
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are FOOLS' is a blanket collective attribution of stupidity to Luos as a community - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: It is only low budget entitled Kikuyus who will still end arguments with useless things like "I don't know who will be president in 2027 but Ruto ni Wantam." Language of a village witch.
label: hate
rationale: 'low budget entitled Kikuyus' collectively attributes negative characteristics - financial meanness and arrogance - to Kikuyus as a group, NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: @JimNjue_254 Wakamba na wakisii are some of the most principled voters in Kenya, they don't suffer fools, Walishikilia Baba many election cycles. Sio kwa ubaya but luos na wakikuyu are the most unreliable, ubebewa akili sana and that's the reason Githinji is president
label: hate
rationale: 'luos na wakikuyu are the most unreliable, ubebewa akili sana' collectively attributes intellectual manipulation and unreliability as fixed group traits - NCIC ethnic contempt.

text: The waria goat fuckers have killed each other in THIKA HIGH SCHOOL, I WONDER WHAT A SOMALI ALSHABAAB TERRORIST IS DOING IN MT KENYA, BUT THAT WILL CHANGE SOON.#RUTOMUSTGO #WANTAM
label: hate
rationale: 'waria goat fuckers' dehumanises Somalis with a slur, 'ALSHABAAB TERRORIST' collectively frames all Somalis as terrorists, and 'THAT WILL CHANGE SOON' is a veiled threat of violence.

text: RT @gpdkaluma: Luyhas are waking up to the reality that Sifuna is a Kikuyu/Gachagua puppet to return power to Mt. Kenya and continue Kikuyu ethnic domination!
label: neither
rationale: Political critique of a named politician (Sifuna) and an electoral power dynamic framed as factional maneuvering; 'Kikuyu ethnic domination' describes a political concern rather than attributing collective negative traits.

text: WATU wa OLKALOU BY-ELECTIONS WACHUNGE IZO GAS COOKERS ZINAEZA WALIPIUKIA , THERE'S NOTHING BEYOND THE EVILS OF KALENJINS. #RUTOMUSTGO #WANTAM
label: hate
rationale: 'THERE'S NOTHING BEYOND THE EVILS OF KALENJINS' collectively attributes boundless evil to Kalenjins as a community - NCIC collective ethnic contempt.

text: We are equally disappointed luos are supporting Kasongo who butcherd luos mercilesly .
label: neither
rationale: Criticism of Luo political choices as inconsistent with their community's interests; no contempt directed at Luos - describes their electoral decision with disappointment, not derogation.

text: RT @Western_Wolf8: Tribalist want to sell Kalonzo as their presidential candidate. While Kenyans want Edwin Watenya Sifuna. Kikuyus on their own even with help of kambas,won't defeat William Ruto with the help of uncivilized Luos,they won't,we will watch while William Ruto massacres them from our TVs.
label: hate
rationale: 'uncivilized Luos' attributes collective barbarism to Luos, and 'William Ruto massacres them from our TVs' approvingly anticipates ethnic mass violence against both Luos and Kikuyus.

text: @mc_owinyo Olundi meruu usiniongeleshe kikuyu tumia dholuo hampendi kuambiwa ukweli tumikeni kabisaa na mpigwe risasi kwa wingi😂😂😂
label: hate
rationale: 'mpigwe risasi kwa wingi' (shoot them in large numbers) is an explicit call for mass lethal violence directed at Kikuyus.

text: @Wakabando Unless Mkikuyu is the devil, coz going forth Gachagua and all this evilness will emerge.
label: hate
rationale: 'Unless Mkikuyu is the devil' equates Kikuyu identity with satanic evil - collective attribution of demonic character to the community beyond criticism of Gachagua alone.

text: @amenya_nelson "Only gachagua is tribal in kenya"
label: neither
rationale: Appears to quote or mock a political talking point about Gachagua; targets a named individual politician, not any ethnic group.

text: @Disembe @king_ndommmm Kiuks know very well that TUTAM is inevitable and they can't stay outside government for unknown period! Their aim was to trick Luos through their in-laws, Babu&Orengo, to leave government so that they come back but tuliwaonea 18🤣🤣🤣. Karibuni but Treasury ni yetu.
label: hate
rationale: 'Their aim was to trick Luos' attributes a collective deceptive conspiracy to Kikuyus ('Kiuks') as a group - NCIC collective ethnic contempt framing an entire community as treacherous manipulators.
